principle: legacy-app is a temporary runtime bridge; visible public UI must be template-first

noGrowthPolicy.reason: legacy-app should shrink or stay stable while behavior moves into purpose-specific modules

extractionBuckets.name: Boot/runtime wiring
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Extract only stable boot sequencing and GG namespace exports after panel and route APIs are mapped.

extractionBuckets.name: Template cloning / DOM hydration glue
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Move cloneTemplateElement and template part hydration helpers after Blog template IDs are locked.

extractionBuckets.name: Comments sheet / replies
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Extract comments sheet controller, reply context, native Blogger compatibility, and comment menu behavior in one focused task.

extractionBuckets.name: Saved listing / saved state
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Move saved storage reads/writes and saved listing render hydration while preserving localStorage failure behavior.

extractionBuckets.name: Popular controls
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Extract popular range state and link hydration after confirming existing template IDs and Blogger widget parsing.

extractionBuckets.name: Related posts / prev-next / dots
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Move related scoring, card hydration, and dot pagination after detail context parsing is isolated.

extractionBuckets.name: Offline/error/fallback behavior
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Extract 404, search-empty, preview fetch failure, and PWA fallback state without changing copy keys.

extractionBuckets.name: Parsing/extraction helpers
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Extract pure text, date, label, feed, and Blogger HTML parsing helpers after tests cover current fallback behavior.

extractionBuckets.name: Store and landing cross-surface references
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Move route vocabulary and cross-surface navigation contracts after Console-owned target config is stable.
